metadata.notes: Dropped en 'invade' -- word-START prefix matched Italian 'l'acqua invade il Malecon' (flooding); 'invasion' is clean at n=8. Dropped 'aircraft carrier' as redundant with the shorter 'carrier'. Dropped de 'Invasion' as a pure Latin duplicate of en 'invasion' (identical match set). Dropped for 0 hits: Caimanera, SOUTHCOM, Southern Command, warship, destroyer, frigate, marines, overflight, airspace, military option, airstrike, MINFAR, militia, sabotage, Playa Giron, buque de guerra, espacio aereo, sobrevuelo, milicia, movilizacion, sabotaje, incursion(es). Both 'Guantanamo' and 'Guantanamo' (accented) are kept -- they are distinct literal strings and each matches titles the other misses.
